name: 9q34_3_Kleefstra_EHMT1
description: 9q34.3 subtelomeric region containing EHMT1, the cause of Kleefstra syndrome. Subtelomeric SDs mediate recurrent ~700 kb to 3 Mb deletions encompassing EHMT1 detected by FISH or arrayCGH.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD blocks flanking EHMT1; recurrent NAHR-mediated deletions cause Kleefstra syndrome 1; intragenic EHMT1 point mutations cause same phenotype.
